title: Tough As Nails | Spanish translation
description: Resource pack that carries the translation of the mod "Tough As Nails" completely in Spanish No texts in other languages!
body:
### Tough as nails Spanish!
Now you can enjoy the mod completely in Spanish, no texts in English or any other language!

### resource installation

download and import to your resources folder requires the original mod!

### important note!

This translation was made for the Fabric version, I haven't tested if it works in Forge or another!
Please comment if it worked on other versions!
